item.title: Tung Tung Tung Sahur is doing a version of the Deep Sea Diver dance by @5stxrd that features the Camden Bop, turning Triple T into a full brainrot dance template. The Deep Sea Diver sound, Camden Bop movement, and chaotic Tung Tung Tung Sahur energy make
